---
title: "Accommodation"
description: "Hotels near MIT."
date: 2026-02-13
categories: [travel, accommodation]
---
## Hotels
- Certain local hotels have MIT rates that vary by date. There is not a specific convention rate available.
- Below are some hotels near MIT campus with MIT rates for April 11-12:
- [Courtyard Boston Cambridge by Marriott](http://www.cambridgecourtyard.com/)
	- 777 Memorial Drive, Cambridge MA 02139
	- Use code `MT2` to book Room Type 1 and 2 with MIT rate.
- [Fairfield Inn and Suites Boston Cambridge](http://www.marriott.com/hotels/travel/bosbg-fairfield-inn-and-suites-boston-cambridge/)
	- 215 Monsignor O’Brien Highway, Cambridge, MA  02141
	- Use code `MT2` to book Room Type 1 and 2 with MIT rate.
- [Holiday Inn Express and Suites Boston Cambridge](http://www.hiecambridge.com/)
	- 250 Monsignor O’Brien Highway, Cambridge, MA 02141
	- Use code `100216750` to book with MIT rate.
- [The Kendall Hotel](http://www.kendallhotel.com/)
	- 350 Main Street, Cambridge, MA 02142
	- Use code `MIT7` to book with MIT rate.
- [Le Meridien Boston Cambridge](https://www.marriott.com/hotels/travel/bosbm-le-meridien-boston-cambridge/)
	- 20 Sidney Street, Cambridge, MA 02139
	- Use code `MT2` to book Room Type 1 with MIT rate.
- [Residence Inn Boston Cambridge](http://www.marriott.com/hotels/travel/boscm-residence-inn-boston-cambridge/)
	- 6 Cambridge Center, Cambridge, MA 02142
	- Use code `MT2` to book with MIT rate.
